creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm able to build net/p5-Crypt-DH-GMP with both a custom PREFIX and 
LOCALBASE.  Additionally, it looks like a similar patch already exists 
for this port (files/patch-Makefile.PL) which adds 
'%%LOCALBASE%%/include' into @INCLUDES.
